content.text: Anthropic’s mission is to ensure transformative AI helps people and society flourish by building safe, reliable, and steerable AI systems.
Safety‑first, even if it slows releases (Responsible Scaling Policy, red‑teaming, audits).
Acting for global good and long‑term human benefit.
High‑trust, collaborative culture and transparent governance.
Building AI that is helpful, honest, harmless, and understandable
